summary.en: An AI agent that accelerates aircraft maintenance by turning logs, manuals, and sensor data into diagnostic insights and work orders—improving safety, uptime, and compliance.
summary.ko: An AI agent that accelerates aircraft maintenance by turning logs, manuals, and sensor data into diagnostic insights and work orders—improving safety, uptime, and compliance.
summary.ja: ログ、マニュアル、センサーデータを診断インサイトと作業指示（ワークオーダー）に変換し、航空機の安全性、稼働率、コンプライアンスを向上させるAIエージェント。

title.en: AIP Use Case: Aircraft Maintenance AI Agent
title.ko: AIP Use Case: Aircraft Maintenance AI Agent
title.ja: AIP活用事例： 航空機整備AIエージェント
